decision.reason: Durable handoff exists and canonical worker_compact_clear permission is enabled; run audited dry-run compact request to validate guardrails without changing worker context.

message:
Manager request: prepare for context compaction/clear only if supported by this Codex session.

Task: qa-compact-clear-guardrail
Saved handoff id: 1
Saved handoff summary: Disposable worker completed a status-only compact/clear guardrail receipt. Worker performed no file edits, branches, commits, PRs, dependency installs, compact, clear, or meaningful project work.

Before compacting or clearing visible context, verify the saved handoff still captures current progress. If it is stale, update it with `scripts/workerctl handoff` first. Then run the Codex compact/clear action only if supported and appropriate. Afterward, report whether compaction happened and what the next concrete step is. Do not edit project files as part of this request.
